nasb.text: So they were willing to receive Him into the boat, and immediately the boat was at the land to which they were going.

esv.text: Then they were glad to take him into the boat, and immediately the boat was at the land to which they were going.

cnv.text: 他們這才把他接上船，船就立刻到了他們要去的地方。

ccb.text: 于是门徒欢然接祂上船，船立刻到了目的地。

csbs.text: 门徒们这才愿意接他上船。船立刻就到了他们所要去的地方。
